productDisplayName: Puma Women Cabana Racer SL Black Casual Shoes
description: The height of style in 1981 brings forward a look that captivates the look of the present in the puma Cabana Racer.UpperSuede and synthetic leather upper for a cool combination of look and texture Contrast puma formstripe for an iconic look Logo tag at the tongue for style Lace-up system for a snug, customised FitSoft textile lining for comfort Padded tongue and collar for extra cushioningMidsoleCushioned sockliner for a customised fit Lightweight PU midsole for supreme comfort and supportOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with flex grooves and waffle pattern lugs for maximum grip and traction on various surfaces
